label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6

extraction.one_line_summary: VINE Jay attacked from breakaway on final category 1 climb in torrential rain, held off EVENEPOEL Remco by 15 seconds while ROGLIČ group hemorrhaged 1:37
tactical_patterns: VINE Jay bridged from peloton to breakaway on final Cat 1 climb, immediately dropped PADUN Mark to solo.
EVENEPOEL Remco isolated without teammates on penultimate climb, attacked with MAS Enric rather than wait for organized chase.
ROGLIČ Primož group refused to chase EVENEPOEL, using him as tempo setter despite losing 1:37 to stage winner.
AYUSO Juan stayed with ROGLIČ group while MAS Enric attacked, UAE tactics prioritizing GC defense over stage hunt.

rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: Bridged solo from peloton to breakaway on Cat 1 climb, immediately dropped companion, held descending skills in rain
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Attacked without team support on penultimate climb, took race lead gaining 1:21 on main GC group
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Only GC contender willing to follow EVENEPOEL attack, surprise podium shows climbing form ahead of expectations
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Lost 1:37 despite having numbers, team controlled pace but did not respond to EVENEPOEL going clear
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Only young GC rider to limit losses with ROGLIČ group, UAE tactical discipline keeping him conservative
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Lost 2:56, completely detached from ROGLIČ group showing early vulnerability on wet mountain descents
rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: negative: Dropped early from breakaway, unable to support EVENEPOEL when Quick-Step needed mountain domestiques most
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: Attempted to follow VINE attack but couldn't sustain, finished in ROGLIČ group without visible difficulty
rider_signals.MOLARD Rudy: negative: Lost leader's jersey by 21 seconds, Groupama team unable to control when rain intensified tactics
rider_signals.PADUN Mark: neutral: Led breakaway over penultimate climb but immediately dropped when VINE bridged, lacked final acceleration
